events.text: Hey there. Before we get started today, I wanted to take a few minutes[br4.492][br4.573]and talk through dosage calculation and medication errors.[br8.04][br8.121]Many of the students I work with worry a lot about making mistakes and how to respond to them.[br13.094][br13.175]What approach do you usually take when it comes to errors?[br16.151]
